scripts.version:gen: node -e "const{execSync:e}=require('child_process');const h=e('git rev-parse --short HEAD').toString().trim();const t=new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-').slice(0,19);const v=require('./package.json').version;const c='export const BUILD_VERSION=\"v'+v+' ('+h+' · '+t+')\";\n';require('fs').writeFileSync('src/lib/version.ts',c)"
